docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-20-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DELA CRUZ, GRACE V.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAURA KRAMER SUJEETH. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JESUS VALDEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GRACE V. DELA CRUZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES AGREE TO SETTLE AMICABLY NON APPEARANCE IS DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
